description: Master registry of citizen attributes used by the JanMitra AI conversation engine, citizen profile builder and eligibility rule engine.

attributes.label: Age
attributes.reason_for_collection: Used to determine eligibility for age-based schemes.

examples: Could you tell me your age?
conversation.follow_up_if_unclear: Could you tell me your completed age in years?

attributes.label: Gender
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some schemes are gender specific.

attributes.label: Marital Status
attributes.reason_for_collection: Required for widow and family welfare schemes.

attributes.label: State
attributes.reason_for_collection: Many schemes are state specific.

examples: Which state do you currently live in?

attributes.label: District
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some schemes are district specific.

attributes.label: Years of Residence
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some schemes require minimum years of residence.

attributes.label: Annual Family Income
attributes.reason_for_collection: Income is one of the most common eligibility criteria.

examples: Approximately what is your family's annual income?

attributes.label: Employment Status
attributes.reason_for_collection: Employment schemes depend on employment status.

attributes.label: Occupation
attributes.reason_for_collection: Many schemes target specific occupations.

attributes.label: Highest Qualification
attributes.reason_for_collection: Education schemes depend on qualification.

attributes.label: Currently Studying
attributes.reason_for_collection: Student schemes require current education status.

conversation.goal: Know if user is currently studying.

attributes.label: Social Category
attributes.reason_for_collection: Reserved category schemes require caste category.

attributes.label: Disability Status
attributes.reason_for_collection: Disability schemes require disability status.

conversation.goal: Know whether the citizen has a disability.

attributes.label: Disability Percentage
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some disability schemes require minimum disability percentage.

attributes.label: Farmer
attributes.reason_for_collection: Agriculture schemes require farmer status.

conversation.goal: Determine whether citizen is a farmer.

attributes.label: Land Holding
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some agriculture schemes depend on land size.

attributes.label: Owns Business
attributes.reason_for_collection: Business schemes require business ownership.

attributes.label: Has Aadhaar
attributes.reason_for_collection: Most government schemes require Aadhaar.

attributes.label: Has Bank Account
attributes.reason_for_collection: Most benefits are transferred via DBT.

conversation.goal: Determine whether the citizen has a bank account.

attributes.label: Receiving Government Pension
attributes.reason_for_collection: Some pension schemes prohibit receiving another government pension.

conversation.goal: Determine whether citizen already receives a government pension.
